items.title: The entire West Coast of the United States from Santa Cruz on up.
items.title_zh: 从圣克鲁斯起的整个美国西海岸。
items.description: The entire West Coast of the United States from Santa Cruz on up. SF, Marin, Seattle, Portland… If only we built housing so that people could actually live there https://t.co/k4eBM6IgcU
items.description_zh: 从圣克鲁斯起的整个美国西海岸。旧金山、马林、西雅图、波特兰……如果我们建造住房，以便人们能够真正居住在那里就好了 https://t.co/k4eBM6IgcU

items.title: The problem with being on the very bleeding edge of adoption is you’re going to constantl…
items.title_zh: 处于采用最前沿的问题是你将不断……
items.description: The problem with being on the very bleeding edge of adoption is you’re going to constantly be changing how you do things as the industry learns. The sweet spot is just a couple steps behind. Whatever is relatively new, but survives all of…
items.description_zh: 处于采用最前沿的问题是，随着行业的学习，您将不断改变您的做事方式。最佳位置仅落后几步。无论是相对较新的，但都幸存下来的……

items.title: What I'm learning from flight simulators is that it would be a bit boring to be an amateu…

items.title: Great read.
items.description: Great read. AI lets you get tremendous leverage that wasn’t available before in almost any domain. That means we’re at a unique moment in history where anyone with a high level of ambition and core skills in any area can overcome a lot of…
items.description_zh: 读得很好。人工智能可以让您获得巨大的影响力，这在几乎所有领域都是前所未有的。这意味着我们正处于历史上一个独特的时刻，任何在任何领域拥有高水平雄心和核心技能的人都可以克服很多……

items.title: Releaseing GBrain v0.22
